description: Create a new Review of Systems (ROS) template named 'Cardio_Consult' in the NOSH ChartingSystem configuration using the administrator credentials (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!). The template must include the following symptom items: Fatigue (General/Constitutional); Chest pain, Palpitations, and Edema (Cardiovascular); and Shortness of breath or Dyspnea (Respiratory). Ensure the template is saved and available for future patient encounters.
